summary: The batch of synthetic samples demonstrates a good coverage of attribute values, but there are some near-duplicate phrasings and overrepresented styles. The emotional style is particularly prevalent, which may limit diversity.
recommendations: Encourage the generation of more diverse emotional expressions to reduce the prevalence of the emotional style.
Introduce additional edge cases or rare scenarios to enhance the diversity of the samples.
Ensure that the generator includes a wider variety of phrasing styles to avoid near-duplicates.
